description: Planted semantically-similar findings (different wording, same meaning) → merged at Stage 3 (cosine ≥ 0.85). Truly distinct findings remain separate.

input_findings.title: fetchUsers triggers N+1 query when accessing user.related
input_findings.description: Accessing user.related inside the .map() loop on line of fetchUsers generates N+1 database queries.

input_findings.title: Lazy-loaded user.related causes per-user database round-trip in fetchUsers
input_findings.description: fetchUsers iterates users and accesses .related lazily, producing one query per user.

input_findings.title: Missing CSRF token validation in handleLogin
input_findings.description: handleLogin POST endpoint does not validate CSRF tokens.
